name: ai-project
description: Discovery and design process for AI projects specifically (one vertical of the claude-tools marketplace, not the whole of it): requirements gathering captured as working markdown in docs/ (the source of truth), with the document package rendered at each review gate (PoC and production) by the project's chosen document style pack (default generic-docx; or your own). Gate-aware taxonomy with the LLD at the PoC gate. Provides /new-ai-project and /render-gate-package, the ai-poc-docs skill, discovery (reasoning model) and gate-renderer (Sonnet) agents, and a design-reviewer agent. Hands off to loop-harness for implementation.
